LIMIT 1;

code:
SELECT 
    MAX(total_deaths) AS max_death_toll,
    MIN(total_deaths) AS min_death_toll
FROM (
    SELECT 
        b.name AS battle_name, 
        s.name AS ship_name,
        SUM(d.killed) AS total_deaths
    FROM 
        battle b
    JOIN
        ship s ON b.id = s.lost_in_battle
    JOIN
        death d ON s.id = d.caused_by_ship_id
    GROUP BY 
        b.name, s.name
) AS death_summary;

code:
WITH StudentCountPerSemester AS (
    SELECT 
        s.semester_id, 
        sem.semester_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT se.student_id) AS student_count
    FROM 
        student_enrolment se
    INNER JOIN 
        semesters sem ON se.semester_id = sem.semester_id
    INNER JOIN 
        students s ON se.student_id = s.student_id
    GROUP BY 
        se.semester_id
)
SELECT 
    semester_id, 
    semester_name
FROM 
    StudentCountPerSemester
WHERE 
    student_count = (
        SELECT MAX(student_count) FROM StudentCountPerSemester
    );

SELECT 
    tt.transcript_date AS earliest_transcript_date,
    tt.transcript_id,
    st.first_name,
    st.middle_name,
    st.last_name,
    st.email_address,
    st.cell_mobile_number,
    dp.degree_summary_name,
    dp.degree_summary_description,
    cr.course_name,
    cr.course_description
FROM transcripts tt
JOIN transcript_contents tc ON tt.transcript_id = tc.transcript_id
JOIN student_enrolment_courses sec ON tc.student_course_id = sec.student_course_id
JOIN students st ON sec.student_enrolment_id = st.student_id
JOIN student_enrolment se ON st.student_id = se.student_id
JOIN degree_programs dp ON se.degree_program_id = dp.degree_program_id
JOIN courses cr ON sec.course_id = cr.course_id
WHERE tt.transcript_date = (
    SELECT MIN(transcript_date) FROM transcripts
);
